author: ryanjamurphy
description: Open or reveal the current note in DEVONthink.

manifest.author: ryanjamurphy
manifest.description: Open or reveal the current note in DEVONthink.
manifest.name: DEVONlink

name: DEVONlink

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Thanks to @abstraction, the latest release features a setting for DEVONlink's `Insert related items` command that intelligently switches from wikilinks (if the related items are markdown) to x-devonthink-item links (if the related items are other filetypes). Thanks!

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Better implementation for the new feature from 2.1.0, a setting to configure whether the Insert Related Items command uses `[[wikilinks]]` or `x-devonthink-item` links.

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Added a link type settings—users can now specify whether they want wikilinks or `x-devonthink-item` links from the Related Items command.

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description:
DEVONlink v2 introduces a new command: "Insert Related Items." This command uses DEVONthink's knowledge of your notes to find notes and files related to the current note, then inserts them into the current note as a list of wikilinks.

![A demo of the Insert Related Items command](https://user-images.githubusercontent.com/3618647/112695652-18385080-8e4a-11eb-98ab-54ea7d125480.mov)

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Fixed a bug with the ribbon icon setting. Previously, the button would disappear, never to be seen again. Now that doesn't happen.

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: DEVONlink would sometimes fail if the database with the associated files wasn't active. I think this version provides a more robust approach.

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: The AppleScript wasn't properly iterating through the available databases. This has been fixed, making the plugin succeed even when the necessary database isn't currently active. (It still needs to be open in DEVONthink, though.)

releases.author: ryanjamurphy
releases.description: Adds a couple of settings for controlling the look/behaviour of the ribbon icon.
